input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8718 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.sonatype.sisu:sisu-inject-bean:2.4.2; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: org.sonatype.sisu:sisu-inject-bean:2.4.2 resolves normal transitive dependencies including cdi-api, sisu-guice:no_aop, and org.eclipse.sisu.inject:0.0.0.M5; optional JUnit/TestNG dependencies are only relevant if tests intentionally exercise those framework annotations.

Existing failing test calls org.eclipse.sisu.space.QualifiedTypeBinder.hear with the old three-argument signature; in the resolved 2.4.2 dependency set the available signature is the newer two-argument form.
The artifact is a deprecated legacy wrapper around Eclipse Sisu, so tests should prefer public wrapper behavior and avoid pinning to removed or changed transitive internals unless explicitly needed.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required for meaningful coverage; the failure is caused by an API drift in the transitive Eclipse Sisu class, not missing setup.
